diagnostics.message: Anthropic API call at client.messages.create has no error handling; network errors, rate limits, and anthropic.APIError exceptions propagate unhandled and crash the caller (only RuntimeError is caught in main()). Wrap in try/except catching anthropic.APIError, anthropic.APIConnectionError, anthropic.RateLimitError and return a structured error response.

next(b.input for b in response.content if b.type == 'tool_use') raises StopIteration if the response contains no tool_use block (e.g., model refuses, returns only text). Use next(..., None) with a guard that returns a structured error.

Image.open(path) and the subsequent convert/save calls can raise PIL.UnidentifiedImageError, OSError, or DecompressionBombError on malformed or malicious user-uploaded images; these are not caught and will crash the Telegram handler. Wrap _load_image_bytes in try/except and return a structured error.

main() only catches RuntimeError, missing anthropic.APIError, FileNotFoundError, PIL errors, and OSError. These will crash with full stack traces and may leak internal paths/details. Broaden the exception handling.

No URL encoding/sanitization on make/model before interpolation into the URL. Claude-controlled output is trusted directly; special characters (slashes, query delimiters, unicode) could produce malformed URLs or enable path traversal / parameter injection. Use urllib.parse.quote and/or a strict slug whitelist ([a-z0-9-]).
requests.get(url) has no timeout; a slow or hanging kolesa.kz will block the executor thread indefinitely and eventually exhaust the bot thread pool. Add timeout=(connect, read) e.g. timeout=(5, 15).

Webhook is started without a secret_token. Anyone who discovers the URL can POST forged Telegram updates to the bot. Pass secret_token=... to app.run_webhook and configure the same token when registering with Telegram.
Dockerfile still runs as root; no USER directive is added before CMD. Any RCE in PIL/requests/telegram handling gains root inside the container. Add a non-root USER.

os.environ['TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN'] and os.environ['WEBHOOK_URL'] raise KeyError at import time if unset, producing an unhelpful stack trace. Validate at startup with a clear error message and non-zero exit.
update.message.photo[-1] raises IndexError if the photo list is empty (edge case: forwarded/edited messages). Guard with a length check and reply with a user-friendly message.

Temporary file is created with delete=False; if file.download_to_drive(tmp_path) raises before the try-block, the tmp file leaks. Move tmp_path creation inside the try or wrap the download in try/finally that unlinks on any failure.

Bare 'except Exception: price = None' silently swallows every error from parser_kolesa_kz, including programming bugs (NameError, TypeError). Narrow to requests.RequestException / ValueError and log the exception so real failures are diagnosable.

identify_car invocation in executor has no error handling; an unhandled anthropic.APIError (or any exception from main.identify_car) crashes the handler and leaves the user with no reply. Wrap run_in_executor in try/except and reply with a friendly error message.

result['error'] is echoed directly to the user. If upstream error messages include internal details (file paths, stack fragments, API hints), they leak to arbitrary chat users. Sanitize or map to a fixed set of user-facing messages.
pytest is listed in production requirements.txt alongside runtime deps. Move test-only dependencies to requirements-dev.txt to reduce production image size and attack surface.

No tests cover main.identify_car: no test for success path (mocked Anthropic client), for file-not-found, for unsupported file type, for API errors, or for the StopIteration edge case when response has no tool_use block.
No tests cover bot.handle_photo: no test for the no-photo path, identify_car error path, price lookup failure path, or tempfile cleanup on exception.
parser_kolesa_kz has no test for HTTP failure (raise_for_status raising) or for timeout/connection errors. The current suite only covers 200 responses.
Cyrillic/edge-case slugification test is unconditionally skipped (two pytest.skip calls back-to-back; second is unreachable). Either implement the handling or remove the dead assertion.
Model name should be verified against the current list of active model IDs; if the ID is wrong or retired, every API call fails. Pin via a named constant.
No User-Agent header on requests.get; default python-requests UA may be blocked or flagged by kolesa.kz anti-bot. Add a realistic User-Agent header.
Regex for avgPrice is brittle: if kolesa.kz changes markup/JSON encoding, result silently becomes None with no signal. Consider parsing the JSON island explicitly or logging a warning on miss.

asyncio.get_event_loop() is deprecated in Python 3.12+ when there is no running loop and will raise in 3.14. Use asyncio.get_running_loop() inside async functions or asyncio.to_thread(identify_car, tmp_path).

build_kolesa_url accepts None values without validation; if Claude returned partial results before the error-check path, this could produce a URL like https://kolesa.kz/cars/none/none/ . Add type/None guards or assert at the call site.
